method: The complete current deterministic suite exercised graph validation, integrity, lifecycle, workspaces, delivery, recovery, and dashboard contracts.
evidence: 112 tests passed and 1 environment-dependent loopback test was skipped
draft template validation passed without claiming executable readiness
a fresh template remained blocked until tests supplied a new question review and explicit intent approval
approved intent was bound to the entire semantic manifest and its current artifact digest; forged approval plus manifest and artifact drift failed closed
GitHub delivery preflight required explicit network and credential authority, bound remote host/owner/repository, and blocked before dispatch or push on mismatch or unavailable auth
delivery published end to end through a non-default safe remote and base in the fixture
GitHub CLI operations were bound to the configured hosting repository
red gates, stale evidence, base drift, conflicting remote heads, and idempotent recovery remained covered
